cards.name: Dol Guldur
cards.quote: Dol Guldur festers under the trees, and the wood around it seems to draw a darker breath.

cards.name: SouthernMirkwood
cards.quote: South Mirkwood is old with trails, fumes, and the patient watch of hidden things.

cards.name: MistyMountains
cards.quote: The Misty Mountains hold their teeth against all who pass.

cards.name: Rhun
cards.quote: Rhun is a far shore of smoke and mounted dust, where distant thunder gathers.
